lines: Oullin is a boutique software engineering and architecture consultancy for startups and scale-ups navigating the AI era. We bring 20+ years of production systems experience — banking, fintech, healthcare, e-commerce, loyalty and customer engagement, and high-availability infrastructure — to the question that matters most right now:
Not what to build with AI. How to build it so it lasts.

title: Reliable
Systems,
Built Right.
items.body: Highly available software needs rigour, calm engineering, and architecture that stays clear under pressure — whether the pressure comes from scale, a regulated environment, or AI-generated code that nobody has fully reviewed.

title: Transform
Without
The Hype.
items.body: Digital transformation in the AI era works when modernisation, delivery, and operating reality move together. AI is a tool. Judgment is the work. We've been doing the work since before the tools existed.

title: Lead
Complex Work
Well.
items.body: Architecture, technical management, and execution should reduce risk, raise clarity, and keep teams moving. We embed close to delivery — not above it.

body: AI tools generate code faster than most teams can review it. The cost of implementation is falling. The cost of a bad architectural decision is not.

Oullin has always been in the business of engineering judgment — knowing what to build, how to build it safely, and what breaks under real load in a regulated environment. The AI era didn't change our work. It made it more necessary.
We work with startups and scale-ups as a fractional AI architecture partner. Not to generate code. To ensure what gets generated holds.

work.title: AI Architecture Sprint
work.description: Two weeks. One production-ready roadmap. Built by engineers who have shipped the systems you're building.

work.title: Fractional AI Architect
work.description: Embedded. Reviewing what your team and your AI tools produce. 3-month minimum.

work.title: Production Hardening
work.description: Your prototype works in demos. We make it work in production.

body.role: Oullin is a boutique software engineering and architecture consultancy focused on resilient systems, AI-era modernisation, and delivery in regulated and high-trust environments.
body.originIntro: The name Oullin is a deliberate misspelling of Ollin, the Aztec sacred day-sign of movement and transformation.
body.origin: The name still points to movement and transformation, but the work is grounded in senior engineering judgement and systems that have to keep running.
body.mission: Led by Gustavo Ocanto, with 20+ years across software, consulting, software architecture, AI-first products and companies, and technical management, including 10+ years in banking.

work.title: Regulated & High-Trust Systems
work.description: Software for banking and other environments where reliability, risk, and operational discipline are not optional.

work.title: AI-Era Architecture & Modernisation
work.description: Practical modernisation that connects legacy reality, platform evolution, and AI capability. Without the hype. With the rigour.

work.title: Fractional Architecture & Technical Leadership
work.description: Hands-on guidance across software architecture, AI integration, delivery, and technical management — when the systems are complex and the stakes are real.

seo.description: Oullin is a boutique AI architecture consultancy for startups and scale-ups. 20+ years of production systems experience — banking, fintech, high-availability infrastructure — applied to the AI era.

jsonLd.name: Oullin
jsonLd.description: Landing page for Oullin, covering highly available software, banking-domain delivery, architecture leadership, and digital transformation in the AI era.
